requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 as the Expected International Baseline for Saint Vincent and the Grenadines BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和IEC 63056作为圣文森特和格林纳丁斯BESS项目验收的预期国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和IEC 63056作為聖文森特和格林納丁斯BESS項目驗收的預期國際基準

summary.en: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation, Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 route, or a comprehensive national BESS certification regime. The Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Bureau of Standards (SVGBS) is the national standards body responsible for standards adoption and conformity assessment; the energy-portfolio ministry regulates energy and utilities. No SVGBS mandatory technical regulation specifically for stationary BESS cells, modules, or systems has been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date. However, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines follows a UK/IEC technical legacy, and IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety baseline for lithium BESS cells and modules. IEC 63056:2020 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements) provides additional system-level battery safety requirements. VINLEC interconnection agreements and project-owner specifications for utility-scale and C&I storage projects in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines are expected to reference IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 compliance as technical prerequisites. Exporters should verify the current SVGBS mandatory standards list and any requirements from the energy-portfolio ministry directly before shipment.
summary.zh: 圣文森特和格林纳丁斯目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》、沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路径或全面的国家BESS认证制度相当。圣文森特和格林纳丁斯标准局（SVGBS）是负责标准采纳和合格评定的国家标准机构；能源主管部委监管能源和公用事业。截至本数据集日期，未从官方来源确认SVGBS专门针对固定式BESS电芯、模组或系统发布强制技术法规。然而，圣文森特和格林纳丁斯遵循英国/IEC技术传统，IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全基准。IEC 63056:2020（电化学储能系统用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）提供了额外的系统级电池安全要求。圣文森特和格林纳丁斯公用事业规模和工商业储能项目的VINLEC并网协议及项目业主规格，预计将以IEC 62619和IEC 63056合规作为技术前提。出口商在出货前应直接向SVGBS核实现行强制标准清单及任何能源主管部委要求。
summary.zht: 聖文森特和格林納丁斯目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》、沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路徑或全面的國家BESS認證制度相當。聖文森特和格林納丁斯標準局（SVGBS）是負責標準採納和合格評定的國家標準機構；能源主管部委監管能源和公用事業。截至本數據集日期，未從官方來源確認SVGBS專門針對固定式BESS電芯、模組或系統發布強制技術法規。然而，聖文森特和格林納丁斯遵循英國/IEC技術傳統，IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全基準。IEC 63056:2020（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）提供了額外的系統級電池安全要求。聖文森特和格林納丁斯公用事業規模和工商業儲能項目的VINLEC併網協議及項目業主規格，預計將以IEC 62619和IEC 63056合規作為技術前提。出口商在出貨前應直接向SVGBS核實現行強制標準清單及任何能源主管部委要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines project specifications)
IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements (system-level battery safety reference expected in project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
SVGBS — Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Bureau of Standards (verify current mandatory standards list directly; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific technical regulation as of dataset date)
the energy-portfolio ministry (regulatory authority for energy systems; verify any BESS safety requirements directly)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. Additionally, GB/T 34131-2017 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management System of Electrical Energy Storage System) governs BMS safety requirements in China. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 or IEC 63056 and are not accepted as equivalents in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines project specifications or VINLEC or energy-portfolio ministry requirements. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 (and IEC 63056 where required) type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。此外，GB/T 34131-2017（电化学储能系统电池管理系统技术条件）管控中国BMS安全要求。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619或IEC 63056协调，不被圣文森特和格林纳丁斯项目规格或VINLEC/能源主管部委要求接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619（以及如要求的IEC 63056）型式试验证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。此外，GB/T 34131-2017（電化學儲能系統電池管理系統技術條件）管控中國BMS安全要求。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619或IEC 63056協調，不被聖文森特和格林納丁斯項目規格或VINLEC/能源主管部委要求接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619（以及如要求的IEC 63056）型式試驗證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能系统电池管理系统技术条件 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management System of Electrical Energy Storage System)

gap.en: Critical gap: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines project owners, VINLEC interconnection agreements, and energy-portfolio ministry project requirements are expected to reference IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 as the safety evidence baseline for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 34131-2017 are not harmonised with these IEC standards and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current SVGBS mandatory standards list and any BESS regulatory requirements from the energy-portfolio ministry before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for all cells and modules; (c) obtain IEC 63056 evidence at battery-system level where required by the project specification or VINLEC interconnection agreement; (d) confirm applicability of IEC 62933-5-1 at the ESS system level; (e) note that Saint Vincent and the Grenadines tropical maritime environment (high humidity, salt mist, ambient temperatures 25–33°C year-round) may impose additional environmental stress-testing or derating requirements beyond standard IEC 62619 conditions — verify with VINLEC and the project owner.
gap.zh: 关键差距：圣文森特和格林纳丁斯项目业主、VINLEC并网协议和能源主管部委项目要求，预计将以IEC 62619和IEC 63056作为BESS电芯和模组的安全证据基准。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 34131-2017未与上述IEC标准协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）出货前核实SVGBS现行强制标准清单及任何能源主管部委 BESS监管要求；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得所有电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在项目规格或VINLEC并网协议要求时，在电池系统级别取得IEC 63056证据；（d）确认IEC 62933-5-1在ESS系统级别的适用性；（e）注意圣文森特和格林纳丁斯热带海洋环境（全年高湿度、盐雾、环境温度25–33°C）可能比标准IEC 62619条件要求额外的环境应力测试或降额要求——须与VINLEC和项目业主核实。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：聖文森特和格林納丁斯項目業主、VINLEC併網協議和能源主管部委項目要求，預計將以IEC 62619和IEC 63056作為BESS電芯和模組的安全證據基準。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 34131-2017未與上述IEC標準協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）出貨前核實SVGBS現行強制標準清單及任何能源主管部委 BESS監管要求；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得所有電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在項目規格或VINLEC併網協議要求時，在電池系統級別取得IEC 63056證據；（d）確認IEC 62933-5-1在ESS系統級別的適用性；（e）注意聖文森特和格林納丁斯熱帶海洋環境（全年高濕度、鹽霧、環境溫度25–33°C）可能比標準IEC 62619條件要求額外的環境應力測試或降額要求——須與VINLEC和項目業主核實。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where VINLEC or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 / IEC 63056 compliance; SVGBS mandatory regulatory obligation specifically for stationary BESS has not been confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with SVGBS and the energy-portfolio ministry
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 34131-2017 are voluntary

source.publisher: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Bureau of Standards (SVGBS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Saint Vincent and the Grenadines as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 are the internationally expected technical baselines for BESS cell, module, and system-level battery safety in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines project specifications and VINLEC interconnection agreements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Saint Vincent and the Grenadines project acceptance. Verify SVGBS and the energy-portfolio ministry current regulatory scope, and confirm IEC 62619 / IEC 63056 evidence requirements with the project owner, VINLEC, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment. Also account for Saint Vincent and the Grenadines tropical maritime environment when specifying thermal and corrosion performance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，圣文森特和格林纳丁斯尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619和IEC 63056是圣文森特和格林纳丁斯项目规格和VINLEC并网协议中BESS电芯、模组及系统级电池安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足圣文森特和格林纳丁斯项目验收要求。出货前请核实SVGBS和能源主管部委现行监管范围，并向项目业主、VINLEC及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619 / IEC 63056证据要求。规格制定时还须考虑圣文森特和格林纳丁斯热带海洋环境对热性能和防腐性能的影响。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，聖文森特和格林納丁斯尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619和IEC 63056是聖文森特和格林納丁斯項目規格和VINLEC併網協議中BESS電芯、模組及系統級電池安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足聖文森特和格林納丁斯項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實SVGBS和能源主管部委現行監管範圍，並向項目業主、VINLEC及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619 / IEC 63056證據要求。規格制定時還須考慮聖文森特和格林納丁斯熱帶海洋環境對熱性能和防腐性能的影響。
